narrative:
23 Ohio Senate district has 251,161 registered voters, with 62.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 8.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 20.1 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +9.2% D−R vs +26.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
